commands.cmd: read-only recipe schema, serving parser, product mapping, food-record, conversion, calculation history, intake provenance, API/UI and Pantry T017 ownership map

summary: Mapped a schema-safe deterministic recipe calculation and explicit server-snapshotted intake vertical slice, including a conservative conversion matrix and the missing production food-record input path.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM produced the same read-only evidence map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must convert the evidence map into one exact non-conflicting Worker package.
